_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: CRC Maesta
project.address: Plot No. GH-11B, Sector 1, Bisrakh Jalalpur, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh 201306
project.description: Super-premium G+33 residential towers offering the lowest density layout with only 2 apartments per floor in Sector 1.
project.long_description: CRC Maesta is a super-premium, under-construction residential development located in the ultra-prime Sector 1, Noida Extension (Greater Noida West). Spanning approximately 3.6 acres of land, this high-end gated community features 5 iconic high-rise towers soaring up to G+33 floors, housing a total of only 358 exclusive residences. Designed for buyers who demand absolute privacy and spaciousness, the project represents the lowest-density development in the region, offering only 2 apartments per floor. Built to high specifications, Maesta offers grand 3 BHK and 4 BHK layouts, each providing 270-degree panoramic green views. The central community highlights a palatial 26,000 sq ft clubhouse, a temperature-controlled indoor swimming pool, high-tech wellness gyms, a dedicated buggy-friendly pathway, and a no-vehicular walking zone, located just 5 minutes drive over the Hindon Bridge to central Noida.
marketing_claims: Lowest Density Development: Only 2 Units per Floor
Just 5 Mins over Hindon Bridge to Central Noida
Fully RERA Compliant with Active Escrow Protection
project.project_risk_flag: Medium: Under construction with expected possession in May 2029.

builder.name: CRC Group
builder.company_overview: CRC Group is a highly acclaimed listed-class developer in Noida NCR (established in 2006). Renowned for exceptional delivery records, robust construction engineering, and customer satisfaction ratings, the group has delivered standout commercial and residential developments (such as CRC Sublimis and CRC Joyous). With a focused focus on structural durability, transparent professional practices, and low-density planning, CRC continues to redefine the NCR luxury horizon.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Premium
unit_types.subtitle: Compact luxury 3 BHK corner suite
unit_types.description: High-end 3 BHK layout offering grand spatial dimensions, a separate dining zone, three pre-installed designer bathrooms, smart home pre-ducted wiring, and expansive balconies providing 270-degree views of the master sports green corridors.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK Elite
unit_types.subtitle: Flagship G+33 Sky Mansion
unit_types.description: Palatial 4 BHK configuration designed with an exclusive G+33 sky mansion feel. Features an integrated private entrance lobby, a master suite with walk-in dressing niche, a large independent utility room, and four expansive balconies overlooking the city parks.
whats_included: Imported Italian marble flooring in living zones

assumptions: GST is 5.0% because project is under construction.

payment_plan.notes: Offers flexible, stage-wise payments conforming to construction milestones.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: CRC Maesta is the ultimate low-density luxury skyscraper on the Sector 1 Hindon corridor, offering a true mansion-in-the-sky experience.
why_buy: Unbeatable Density: The lowest density residential layout in Noida Extension with only 2 apartments per floor.
Unparalleled commuting: Placed directly on the Sector 1 Hindon bridge, only a 5-minute drive to Central Noida.
Spectacular G+33 height providing 270-degree panoramic views of open greens.
Elite specifications: Central VRF AC ready pre-ducting and temperature-controlled indoor pool.
why_avoid: Under construction: expected handovers scheduled for May 2029, requiring a steady holding timeline.
Premium starting price position (starts at ₹2.32 Cr) limits speculative fast-flipping opportunities.
decision_profile.best_for: HNIs, C-suite corporate executives, and NRI buyers wanting low-density, high-prestige skyscrapers close to Noida's boundaries.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Affordable budget seekers (under Rs 1.5 Cr) or buyers looking for immediate move-in keys under 2 years.

buyerPersonas.headline: Sky Mansions Close to Noida
reasons: Only 2 apartments per floor, ensuring absolute vertical privacy.
Just 5 mins drive over the bridge to Noida Sector 75.

riskRadar.description: Active construction on structural frames; expected possession May 2029.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: Active with State Bank of India.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: High capital appreciation corridor along Sector 1 and central Hindon links.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate - willing to fund systematic milestones for skyscraper completions
persona_profile.family_stage: Established nuclear families with school-going kids
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT corridors and corporate Expressway hubs
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for extreme vertical privacy (only 2 flats per floor), direct Central Noida bridge connectivity, and high-end security.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: The ultimate low density luxury development. For buyers looking to invest in a true sky-mansion close to Noida, CRC Maesta is an exceptional asset.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Outstanding. Italian marble flooring, centralized VRF climate systems, and temperature-controlled indoor pools provide a premium lifestyle.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Excellent appreciation play. Sector 1 is Noida Extension's finest sector, and Maesta's low density will command consistent resale premiums.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Secure and eco-friendly. Buggy pathways and safe pedestrian ground layouts keep children completely insulated from vehicle hazards.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Highly secure wealth container offering consistent 12-15% long-term asset appreciation and stable luxury tenant yields.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Defines the absolute benchmark in Sector 1. Italian marble, Otis lifts, and 26K clubhouse.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: RERA-compliant escrow mitigates delivery risks. The builder has strong capital buffers and no litigation.
walk_away_conditions: Urgent need to move in under 2 years.
negotiation_leverage: Highlight under-construction timelines to negotiate complimentary covered car parking slots.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ideal time to book. Secure pre-launch pricing rates before towers casting initiates primary floor rises.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Lower density with only 2 apartments per floor vs 4; closer proximity to Noida bridge link.
competitors.verdict: Choose CRC Maesta for low-density vertical privacy and Noida access; choose Gulshan Avante for faster move-in.
competitors.price_delta_note: CRC Maesta is approx par with Gulshan Avante.
